creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I had already re-built all of the listed ports (and several library ports), so I rebuilt mesa-dri and mpv WITH_DEBUG=1, but the backtrace still showed no more. I rebuilt everything listed bu 'pkg info -d mpv'.

Note that I don't have firmware installed since it locks my system when it is loaded (Alder Lake) bug 270888, so I'm not sure that mesa has much to do.
